title: SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups for people living with HIV and their families with group meetings, food, activities, and referrals to community resources. 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their families Hours: Call for current schedule Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of HIV-positive status LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos, Douglas, Josephine, Lane, and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Health/Disability Related Support Groups * AIDS/HIV Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEPATITIS C CASE MANAGEMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY
